scripts.api:build: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/config && npm run build -w @larry/db && npm run build -w @larry/ai && npm run build -w @larry/api
scripts.api:test: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/config && npm run build -w @larry/db && npm run build -w @larry/ai && npm run test -w @larry/api
scripts.worker:build: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/config && npm run build -w @larry/db && npm run build -w @larry/ai && npm run build -w @larry/worker
